infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Aero Drone App needs Bluetooth to connect to your drone and send commands.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Aero Drone App needs local network access to connect to your drone's WiFi for video streaming.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location permission is required to detect WiFi networks for drone connection.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow Aero Drone App to connect to your drone via Bluetooth.
